quest.0138DA9E72BF9CE0.quest_desc.original: This compass will lead you to the nearest &aHealing Spring&r.
quest.0138DA9E72BF9CE0.quest_desc.translation: 這個羅盤能夠引領你找到最近的&a治癒之泉&r。

quest.036047DE66198D10.quest_desc.original:
If &aLeaves&r are dried out, they can be used to make stronger fibers.

Make a &aCampfire&r and place the &aLeaves&r in it to dry them out. Once dry, you should be able to turn them into straw by breaking them with &aCrook&r.
quest.036047DE66198D10.quest_desc.translation:
烤乾&a樹葉&r能夠將它們製成更堅韌的纖維。

合成一簇&a營火&r並將&a樹葉&r放上去，烤乾它們。當它們被烤乾後，使用&a曲柄杖&r破壞它們就能取得稻梗了。

quest.0AAA6858DAF43067.quest_desc.original:
Cobblestone will only get you so far.

Make a &aStone Hammer&r so that you can break Cobblestone down into a finer material. There has to be some minerals in it somewhere!
quest.0AAA6858DAF43067.quest_desc.translation:
鵝卵石能夠做的事就這麼多了。

合成一把&a石錘&r，這樣你就可以將鵝卵石粉碎成更多種材料了。石塊之中可能殘餘著一些礦物！

quest.0ACCAD3AEF57F2E2.quest_desc.original:
Instead of picking through &7Dirt&r with a &2Crook&r, the &aCrude Brush&r can help you find smaller objects like &2Seeds&r to start a farm!

Grass or &dDelightful Dirt&r can also be used to make a &aPassive Mob Farm&r that can be a good source of food and resources, especially &bLeather&r.

The &dEcho of Guidance&r also sells a Gateway containing passive mobs.
quest.0ACCAD3AEF57F2E2.quest_desc.translation:
除了使用&2曲柄杖&r挑揀&7泥土&r之外，&a粗製刷子&r能夠幫助你找尋位於其中的更小物件，像是：各種「種子」，這樣你就可以開始進行農作了！

草地或&d祝福之土&r能夠用來製造出一片&a被動生物農場&r，動物們能夠作為一種很好的食物來源，也能夠取得許多有用資源，
像是「&b皮革&r」等。

&d指引嚮導之回聲&r也有賣一個含有各種被動生物的「傳送門珍珠」。

quest.0B295CE75D367D59.quest_desc.original:
Wood is important, especially in a world made of Stone. You need to make use of everything you can get!

With your first pieces of Wood, make some &aWooden Shears&r to properly harvest those leaves as well!
quest.0B295CE75D367D59.quest_desc.translation:
木頭很重要，尤其你現在是在全是石頭的世界。你必須要物盡其用！

你可以使用你的第一塊木頭做出一把&a木剪刀&r剪下那些樹葉納為己用。

quest.1520491A7804E08E.quest_desc.original:
To be able to use the &aWorker Token&r in an &2Unearther&r, you'll need a villager that has one of these 3 jobs:

- &aArcheologist&r: Can brush Dirt, Dust, Mud, and Sand. Uses a &aDecorative Pot&r for the workstation.

- &2Geologist&r: Can brush Gravel, Soul Sand, and Crushed Kivi. Uses a &2Salvaging Table&r for the workstation.

- &dDimensionalist&r: Can brush Netherrack, End Stone, and Otherrock. Uses the &dResonanz Engineering Block&r for the workstation.
quest.1520491A7804E08E.quest_desc.translation:
要在&2資源發掘站&r中使用&a勞工令牌&r的話，村民的職業必須為下列三種之一：

- &a考古學家&r：可以刷掃泥土、塵土、泥巴和沙子。\n以&a裝飾陶罐&r作為工作站。

- &2地質學家&r：可以刷掃礫石、靈魂砂和粉碎奇石。\n以&2分解台&r作為工作站。

- &d維度學家&r：可以刷掃地獄石、終界石和異界石。\n以&d諧振工程方塊&r作為工作站。

quest.193690C049F4B4BB.quest_desc.original:
Using a &2Hammer&r, you can also break down Dirt into Sand, and then into &aDust&r. These will provide different resources needed for progression.

The &2Hammer&r can also smash down &aCompressed Blocks&r to speed things up!
quest.193690C049F4B4BB.quest_desc.translation:
利用&2錘&r，你還能夠將泥土粉碎為沙子，再粉碎為&a塵土&r。它們之中蘊含著的資源各不相同，但都是你發展所需的資源。

&2錘&r也可以粉碎&a壓縮方塊&r以加速這一過程！

quest.1A84E167BFF8C2E4.quest_desc.original:
No dirt... no trees... no tools... But you've still got your fists.

Break some &aStone&r to get &2Pebbles&r that you can work with.

&eNote&r: This must be done with an empty hand!
quest.1A84E167BFF8C2E4.quest_desc.translation:
沒有泥土...沒有樹木...沒有工具...但你還有你的雙拳。

擊破一些&a石頭&r以取得一些大有用處的&2石子&r。

&e備註&r：必須要空手才能取得石子！

quest.1F9D3474C8A655A9.quest_desc.original:
Welcome to the &6Archive of Guidance&r.

Speak with the &dEcho&r to begin your journey...

&eNote&f: If you're playing with friends, complete this quest first and reach your home base &nbefore&r inviting others to your team.
quest.1F9D3474C8A655A9.quest_desc.translation:
歡迎來到&6指引嚮導檔案庫&r。

與&d回聲&r交談，你的旅程即將開始...

&e備註&f：如果你正在和朋友一起玩的話，請先完成這項任務、並先創建完你的基地&n之後&r，再邀請其他人加入你的隊伍。

quest.277181E358575312.quest_desc.original:
Not everyone likes &c&mslaughtering innocent cows&r animal farms. You may slay the undead instead to acquire &aRotten Flesh&r, which can be cured into &bLeather&r in a &2Campfire&r.

It's probably a good idea to consider making a &2Backpack&r with some of this leather!
quest.277181E358575312.quest_desc.translation:
不是所有人都喜歡&c&m屠宰無辜的牛&r來獲得牠們的掉落物。相反，你可以透過殺死不死族來獲得&a腐肉&r：接著利用&2營火&r將它烤成&b皮革&r。 

將這些皮革製成一個&2背包&r或許是個好主意！

quest.28683BFE22FBCCFC.quest_desc.original:
If you didn't know, you can burn logs into &7Charcoal&r in a furnace!

This can be a good early source of fuel.
quest.28683BFE22FBCCFC.quest_desc.translation:
以防你不知道，你可以在熔爐中將原木熔煉成&7木炭&r！

木炭在早期能夠作為一種很好的燃料來源。

quest.35791C02AC048594.quest_desc.original:
The &aChronon Cell&r allows you to store the power of time, called &bChronon&r.

The &2Chronon Generator&r will slowly generate &bChronon&r for the &aCell&r, which enables teleportation to your base using /home.

You can also use the &aCell&r to teleport to the &6World Engine&r by Sneak + Right-clicking with it in your hand.
quest.35791C02AC048594.quest_desc.translation:
&a時空粒子單元&r能夠儲存時空之中蘊含的能量，俗稱「&b時空粒子&r」。

&2時空粒子產生器&r會緩慢產生並直接向&a單元&r之中存入&b時空粒子&r：它們是你使用像是「/home」或「/spawn」等傳送方式所需的能量。

你也可以手持&a單元&r「潛行 + 右鍵」來傳送至&6世界引擎&r處。

quest.39F6026AB205841A.quest_desc.original:
While the pack contains &eFTB Ultimine&r, it does not work on &aStone&r!

["Ultimine can be toggled with the keybind ", { "keybind": "key.ftbultimine", "color": "green" }, "."]

It also requires a tool in your hand to work.
quest.39F6026AB205841A.quest_desc.translation:
本模組包有著《&eFTB 連鎖挖礦&r》模組，但它對&a石頭&r無效！

["連鎖挖礦可以藉由按鍵「", { "keybind": "key.ftbultimine", "color": "green" }, "」觸發。"]

你手上必須要有工具才能使用連鎖挖礦。

quest.3BD07A9C3A6ED05A.quest_desc.original:
Within the dark, empty spaces, it sounds like creatures have begun to crawl up from the depths of the stone.

With some luck, you might be able to find a deceased &aVillager&r stirring up.

Create an empty dark room to allow for a &aZombie Villager&r to spawn, and use the &2Healing Springs&r to bring them back to life.

&eNote&f: Make sure not to build the room too close to the &aHealing Spring&r as mobs won't spawn there! Look for the &bBiome Name&r under your minimap or using 'F3' to check.
quest.3BD07A9C3A6ED05A.quest_desc.translation:
於黑暗、空曠之地，你聽到了某些生物從岩層深處爬地而出的聲響。

幸運的話，你說不定能夠找到一位已故&a村民&r佇立著。

開闢一片空曠的黑暗房間，讓&a殭屍村民&r能夠生成，並將他帶至&2治癒之泉&r處起死回生。

&e備註&f：請確保不要將房間蓋得太靠近&2治癒之泉&r，那裡不會有怪物生成！請看你小地圖下方的&b生態域&r名稱或使用「F3」自行查找。

quest.3DF42A6D832C0492.quest_desc.original:
The &dAction Pad&r is a marvel of the ages. It can route many of your commonly used commands, such has home, spawn and world engine teleportation through this device.

["You can open the menu by using the item or with the keybind ", { "keybind": "ftbpackcompanion.key.open_action_pad", "color": "green" }, "."]

Many other teleportation options will appear as you meet the various &dEchoes&r and progress through the pack.

If you ever lose your device, you can claim a replacement in the questbook emergency items tab.
quest.3DF42A6D832C0492.quest_desc.translation:
&d操作面板&r是跨時代的奇蹟。這台設備能夠定位到任何你通常會使用指令才能傳送到的地方，像是：你的基地、重生點或世界引擎。 

["你可以直接使用該物品或使用按鍵「", { "keybind": "ftbpackcompanion.key.open_action_pad", "color": "green" }, "」來開啟它的介面"]

隨著你遇見更多的&d回聲&r和推進模組包進度時，上面會出現更多其他的傳送選項。

如果你不小心丟失了你的設備，你可以在任務書的「緊急道具」分頁領取一台新的。

quest.4194852B70E0ECEB.quest_desc.original:
The &dEcho of Guidance&r has directed you to create your first home.

Head out of the &6Archive&r and enter through the giant portal to make your place in this world!
quest.4194852B70E0ECEB.quest_desc.translation:
&d指引嚮導之回聲&r指引你去創建你的第一個基地。

離開&6檔案庫&r並穿越那巨大傳送門，在這個世界上找到專屬於你的位置！

quest.4445906BD04FC37D.quest_desc.original:
With your new &3Unearthing&r skill, you should easily be able to find better materials in the different blocks that you can brush.

Try brushing &aDust&r to see what you can &3Unearth&r.
quest.4445906BD04FC37D.quest_desc.translation:
由於你掌握了新的&3發掘&r技術，你應該能夠更輕易地在刷掃方塊時找到更好的材料。

試著刷掃&a塵土&r來看看你能&3發掘&r出甚麼新東西。

quest.455930CEC0C90C0C.quest_desc.original:
The &eClavis&r mod adds special interaction with locked chests.

Chests are now locked behind a lockpicking minigame! Line up the needle with the locks and left click to unlock them.

The less you miss and the faster you complete the challenge, the better the loot!

&eNote&r: The chest will still unlock with reduced rewards if you fail. You can also use &aLock Picks&r to completely skip the minigame.
quest.455930CEC0C90C0C.quest_desc.translation:
&e《鎖匙》&r模組為上鎖寶箱加入了各種特別的互動。

現在所有寶箱都需要經歷一場開鎖小遊戲才能解鎖！當指針與鎖銷連成一線時點擊左鍵就能開啟它。

失誤次數越少、開啟的越快，能夠獲得的獎勵就越豐富！

&e備註&r：就算失敗，你還是能夠以更少的獎勵來打開寶箱。你也可以使用&a開鎖器&r跳過小遊戲。

quest.47C1E9F93CEF25D3.quest_desc.original: Increasing your &3Unearther Level&r will also increase the types of drops you get from brushing blocks.
quest.47C1E9F93CEF25D3.quest_desc.translation: 提升你的&3發掘等級&r會增加你刷掃方塊時所能獲得的物品種類。

quest.4F27342D2DA7C605.quest_desc.original:
Smashing &7Gravel&r down further turns it into &aDirt&r!

&aDirt&r is always filled with some kind of seed or sapling.

Try breaking &aDirt&r with a &aStone Crook&r.
quest.4F27342D2DA7C605.quest_desc.translation:
將&7礫石&r再次粉碎成&a泥土&r！

&a泥土&r之中總會有某些種子或樹苗。

試著使用&a石製曲柄杖&r破壞&a泥土&r吧。

quest.4FE01499D831CACC.quest_desc.original:
As you unlock more &6World Engine&r recipes, you will notice that some of them will require fluids.

Make sure the fluid inside the &6World Engine&r is placed in the correct tank shown in JEI, otherwise the recipe will not function properly.
quest.4FE01499D831CACC.quest_desc.translation:
隨著你解鎖更多&6世界引擎&r配方，你會發現其中有些配方需要消耗流體。

請確保這些流體，位於 JEI 所標示的對應流體槽，否則配方
將無法正常運作。

quest.5151A30EB06C1122.quest_desc.original:
Passively spawned chickens can drop eggs randomly, but you can also get the eggs before the chickens.

They may randomly drop from the &bLoot Bee&r event, or, if you're very lucky, the &bChicken Jockey&r event may also lay an egg.

["With access to eggs and feathers, you can get started on the ", { "text": "Roost Ultimate", "color": "yellow", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": {"action": "change_page", "value": "50E133C3E351255E"}, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "Go to Roost Starting Quest"} }, " mod, allowing your chickens to produce other resources than just plain old eggs."]
quest.5151A30EB06C1122.quest_desc.translation:
自然生成的雞有時會掉落雞蛋，但你也有可能會先得到蛋才孵出牠們。

「&b空投蜜蜂&r」事件有時會投下雞蛋，或是如果你足夠幸運，「&b雞騎士&r」事件有時也會產下一顆蛋。

["當你獲得了雞蛋和羽毛之後，你就可以開始你的《", { "text": "雞舍", "color": "yellow", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": {"action": "change_page", "value": "50E133C3E351255E"}, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "前往「雞舍開幕」任務"} }, "》模組之旅了，該模組會讓你的雞能夠產下除了雞蛋之外的其他資源。"]

quest.54A433FAF8A65CC0.quest_desc.original:
Once you've cured a &aVillager&r, the &dEcho of Guidance&r knows of a tool you can craft that can harness their skills for future use. To make this tool, you must use the &6World Engine&r.

The &6World Engine&r can harness the power of ancient crafts to create advanced items beyond your current knowledge.

To reach the &6World Engine&r, a portal must be activated by Sneak + Right-clicking a &aChronon Cell&r once it contains some &bChronon&r.

Your goal will be to craft an &aEcho Encoder&r using the latent magical powers stored within amethyst.
{@pagebreak}
["There are 2 main ways to get ", {"text": "Leather", "color": "green"}, " early on: ", {"text": "Killing a Cow", "color": "dark_green", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "0ACCAD3AEF57F2E2"}, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "Go to Grass Quest"}}, ", or by using ", {"text": "Rotten Flesh", "color": "red", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "277181E358575312"}, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "Go to Rotten Flesh Quest"}}, "."]
quest.54A433FAF8A65CC0.quest_desc.translation:
看來你成功治癒了一隻&a村民&r，&d指引嚮導之回聲&r知道你現在可以合成一種工具：用以充分利用他們的技能。要製造這把工具，你會需要用到&6世界引擎&r。

&6世界引擎&r能夠驅動遠古工藝之力，製造出凌駕於你現有知識之上的進階物品。

你會需要手持一台裝有足量&b時空粒子&r的&a時空粒子單元&r「潛行 + 右鍵」，才能開啟通往&6世界引擎&r的傳送門，最終抵達那裡。

你的目標是利用蘊藏在紫水晶中的潛在魔法力量合成出一把&a回聲編碼工具&r。
{@pagebreak}
["在早期有著兩種取得", {"text": "皮革", "color": "green"}, "的主要方式：", {"text": "殺死一隻牛", "color": "dark_green", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "0ACCAD3AEF57F2E2"}, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "前往「草地」任務"}}, "或是使用", {"text": "腐肉", "color": "red", "underlined": true, "clickEvent": { "action": "change_page", "value": "277181E358575312"}, "hoverEvent": {"action": "show_text", "contents": "前往「腐肉」任務"}}, "。"]

quest.5868F616B3756FF3.quest_desc.original:
So far you have made good use of your fists, but now it's time to step it up a notch.

Those &2Leaves&r have some life in them. You just need to crush them to find it.

Place down the &aBasin&r, then place some &2Leaves&r on top of it. Jump on them until you've squeezed out every last drop from them. 

This will create &bWater&r, but you'll need a way to scoop it out...
quest.5868F616B3756FF3.quest_desc.translation:
你已經充分利用了你的雙手，現在是時候輪到你的雙腳了。

你剛採下的&2樹葉&r之中有些生機。但你會需要壓碎它們才能找出那些生機。

放下一台&a木水盆&r，接著在它的上方一格處放置一些&2樹葉&r。在上面一直跳跳跳，直至你碾碎了每一片樹葉。

這一過程會產出&b水&r，但你需要另尋其他方法將它舀出...

quest.59E8FEC3758635DF.quest_desc.original:
According to the &dEchoes&r, recently cured Villagers are unskilled. You must train them to increase their Unearthing Levels!

Once they are placed into an &aUnearther&r, they will slowly gain levels over time.

You can place them back into the world using the Token, but will need to pick them back up with the &aEcho Encoder&r.

&cWarning&r: Placing the Villager back into the world as a Token will cause the Villager to lose their job and levels!
{@pagebreak}
While they can work without food, feeding them is probably a good idea.

The food you feed them will give them special bonuses depending on what you feed them!

- More Shanks = Faster work speed.

- More Saturation = Longer-lasting food.
quest.59E8FEC3758635DF.quest_desc.translation:
據&d回聲&r所述，剛痊癒的村民為無業村民。你必須要訓練他們才能提升他們的發掘等級！

當他們被丟進&a資源發掘站&r後，他們就會隨著時間緩慢提升等級。

你可以使用令牌來將他們再次放回世界上，但會需要再次使用&a回聲編碼工具&r將他們轉換回去。

&c警告&r：將令牌中的村民放回世界上會導致他丟失他的工作和等級！
{@pagebreak}
即使他們不需要食物也能工作，餵食他們可能會是一個好主意。

根據你餵給他們的不同食物，他們會獲得額外的不同加成！

- 更高的&c飢餓值&r = 更快的工作速度。

- 更高的&e飽食度&r = 食物的持續時間更久。

quest.5E90192C6F3011B7.quest_desc.original:
With the power of the &6World Engine&r and an &aEcho Encoder&r, you can manufacture more villagers using food once you have at least 1 &2Worker Token&r.

&7&oGone are the days of manually making more villagers.
quest.5E90192C6F3011B7.quest_desc.translation:
有了&6世界引擎&r和&a回聲編碼工具&r的力量，當你取得了一個&2勞工令牌&r之後：你現在可以使用足量的食物來製造出更多隻村民。

&7&o手動繁殖更多村民的日子已一去不復返。

quest.60633295CFD82152.quest_desc.original:
Digging with a pickaxe will take forever since it only mines one block at a time.

Upgrade to a &bHammer&r from the &bJustHammers&r mod! The basic &aStone Hammer&r can dig in a 3x3x1 area per swing, with the better Hammers digging out even bigger areas.
quest.60633295CFD82152.quest_desc.translation:
只用鎬挖石頭會花上許多時間，因為它一次只能破壞一個方塊。

那不妨試試《鎚子合集》（JustHammers）模組中的&b鎚&r吧！最小把的&a石鎚&r每次能夠挖下 3x3x1 空間的方塊，\n還有更多更強力的鎚子能夠一次挖下更多的方塊。

quest.6089F3DC28FB69C0.quest_desc.original:
The &aDirt&r seems to have plenty of &2Saplings&r that you can use! You can get these saplings by mining &aDirt&r with the &2Crook&r.

While you can wait for a tree to grow, you can force it to grow by using &eSquat Grow&r.

["This can be toggled with the keybind ", { "keybind": "key.squatgrow.toggle", "color": "green" }, "."]
quest.6089F3DC28FB69C0.quest_desc.translation:
&a泥土&r之中富含著你心心念念的&2樹苗&r！你可以使用&2曲柄杖&r挖掘&a泥土&r取得樹苗。

你當然可以慢慢看著樹木長大，但你也可以使用&e豐收之舞&r，透過反覆蹲下來加速它們的生長。

["可以使用按鍵「", { "keybind": "key.squatgrow.toggle", "color": "green" }, "」來開關此功能。"]

quest.6B387999FBEE2E9E.quest_desc.original:
This pack comes with random events that are disabled by default. To enable them, complete this quest!

&eNote&r: Some events might contain jump scares. You can toggle each event using the command &b/events toggle <event>&r.

For example, if you want to disable the jump scare event, you can use the command &a/events toggle ftb:creeper&r.
quest.6B387999FBEE2E9E.quest_desc.translation:
本模組包包含著一些預設為「關閉」的隨機事件。你要完成這項任務才能將它們「開啟」！

&e備註&r：某些事件具有「突發驚嚇」成份。你可以藉由下列指令來開關它們：&b/events toggle <事件 ID>&r。

舉例來說：如果你想要關閉「神風特攻苦力怕」事件的話，你可以輸入「&a/events toggle ftb:creeper&r」。

quest.71205F3FE5AD49B3.quest_desc.original:
To show the &dEcho&r that you've learned how to &3Unearth&r resources from this world, you should make an &aIron Hammer&r from the materials you can brush from &7Gravel&r.

This will speed up gathering cobblestone greatly.

&eNote&r: Completing this quest will upgrade your &3Unearther Level&r, which increases the types of items that you receive when &3Brushing&r.
quest.71205F3FE5AD49B3.quest_desc.translation:
為了向&d回聲&r展示你已經掌握了該如何從這世界上&3發掘&r出資源，你該使用你刷掃&7礫石&r時獲得的材料來做出一把&a鐵錘&r。

這把工具能夠顯著提升你採集鵝卵石的速度。

&e備註&r：完成這個任務會提升你的&3發掘等級&r：增加你&3刷掃&r方塊時所能獲得的物品種類。

quest.75F6827C1FB52C91.quest_desc.original:
You may be surrounded by stone, but that doesn't help you for automation.

The &aCobble Generators&r will generate cobblestone over time, with higher tiers generating more per tick.

You can also create an &aAuto Hammer&r to break the cobble down into the different blocks needed for the &aUnearther&r!

&eNote&r: &cLava&r can easily be acquired by using the gift you get from meeting the &dEcho of the Machinist&r. You can also get it from the &cNether&r ring.
quest.75F6827C1FB52C91.quest_desc.translation:
你被包圍在石頭之中，但這並沒有為你的自動化帶來幫助。

&a鵝卵石製造機&r會隨著時間製造出鵝卵石，更高階級能夠產得更快。

你也能夠做出一台&a自動錘&r來自動幫你將鵝卵石粉碎成各種不同方塊供你&a發掘&r！

&e備註&r：初訪&d機械前輩之回聲&r所給予你的禮物能夠很輕鬆地取得&c熔岩&r。你也能在&c地獄&r環帶中找到&c熔岩&r。

quest.7B2044D285C9F1E3.quest_desc.original:
Most quests in the main chapters that are shaped like a &aGear&r are &dEcho&r related quests!

This means that you will most likely need to return to an &dEcho&r to complete their task, or see if they have something new for you.
quest.7B2044D285C9F1E3.quest_desc.translation:
所有長得像是一片&a齒輪&r的主線任務都是與&d回聲&r有關的任務！

這代表你很可能需要回訪&d回聲&r來完成他們的任務目標，或是回去檢查他們是否有提供一些新東西。

quest.7D945B6D1311B741.quest_desc.original:
The &dEcho&r mentioned a &2Healing Spring&r somewhere north of your base that can provide you with resources to make the &aChronon Cell&r.

&7&oIt's time to dig, dig, dig
quest.7D945B6D1311B741.quest_desc.translation:
&d回聲&r提到你的基地的北方有著一座&2治癒之泉&r：裡面有著製造出&a時空粒子產生器&r所需的資源。

&7&o是時候一路挖挖挖了

task.59521977C507A466.title.translation: 與&d指引嚮導之回聲&r交談
